category_sources: Official GitHub README describes peco as an interactive filtering tool written in Go.

display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository title is peco/peco.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is long and comprehensive and is the primary documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo was intentionally not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official README says peco is written in Go and filters interactive selections.
source_facts.description and executables identify a CLI filtering tool.
